REPORTS.description: KV Namespace used to store generated HTML reports and lightweight metadata.

UPLOAD_TOKEN.description: A shared secret used by the AstrBot plugin. Generate one with `openssl rand -hex 32` and use the same value in `web_report.upload_token`.

PUBLIC_BASE_URL.description: Optional custom domain for report links, for example `https://report.example.com`.

DEFAULT_TTL_SECONDS.description: Default retention time for reports in seconds. The plugin can override this per upload.
